items.meaning: This edition _____________ a little from the first one. (variety)
Today, English is considered a _____________ language. (globe)
It is important to reward good _____________ . (behave)
People use the Internet for _____________ . (entertain)
_____________, she'd find out who he was. (Eventual)
Waiting for exam results is a time of great _____________ . (anxious)
Travelling in an airplane for the first time was a _____________ experience. (memory)
It is still a bit _____________ to use the Internet in everyday. (cost)
They brought me two laptops, but neither worked _____________. (satisfaction)
She was always so funny and _____________. (entertain)
This means that, _____________, we have no chance of finishing on time. (effect)
Art and English are _____________ subjects in our school. (compel)
We do not like him because he has been one of strict _____________ . (exam)
The environment in our neighborhood needs _____________ . (conservation)
_____________ , these innovations help us save the big amount of energy. (Ultimate)
Why not organize Easter _____________ in Vietnam? (nation)
Please call me if _____________ . (need)
The local authorities should _____________ the fish catching by electricity. (prohibition)
If we go on wasting water, there will be a _____________ of fresh water in a few decades. (short)
Humans are gradually _____________ the environment. (destruction)
The Internet has _____________ developed and become part of our daily life. (increase)
I feel disappointed because the laptop which I bought last week works _____________ . (efficiency)
